# Segura's Towing

> Family-owned 24/7 towing and roadside assistance based in Inglewood, CA. Serving Inglewood, the South Bay, and South LA since 2010 with a 15-30 minute average response time, transparent upfront pricing, and a modern flatbed fleet.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Segura's Towing
- **Founded:** 2010
- **Type:** Towing service, Automotive business, Local business
- **Phone:** (310) 490-0246
- **Phone (E.164):** +13104900246
- **Address:** 3519 W 108th St, Inglewood, CA 90303, United States
- **Geo:** 33.9617, -118.3531
- **Hours:** 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year (including all holidays)
- **Website:** https://segurastowing.com
- **Service area:** Inglewood, Hawthorne, Lennox, Westchester, Ladera Heights, View Park, Hyde Park, Gardena, Lawndale, El Segundo, Manhattan Beach, Redondo Beach, Torrance, Culver City, South LA, LAX area
- **Average response time:** 15 to 30 minutes (10 to 15 minutes inside Inglewood)
- **Pricing:** Upfront quotes by phone. No hidden fees. $$ price range.
- **Payment:** Cash, credit card

## What we do

Segura's Towing is a family-owned tow truck company in Inglewood, California. We dispatch flatbed and wheel-lift trucks 24 hours a day for emergency towing, roadside assistance, lockouts, jump starts, fuel delivery, and accident recovery. Three generations of operators with over 10,000 vehicles towed safely.

## Services

- [Emergency Towing](https://segurastowing.com/services/emergency-towing): 24/7 emergency tow truck dispatch in Inglewood, CA. 15 to 30 minute average response. Flatbed and wheel-lift trucks available.
- [Flatbed Towing](https://segurastowing.com/services/flatbed-towing): Damage-free flatbed transport for all vehicle types — luxury cars, AWD, low-clearance, classic, and exotic vehicles.
- [Roadside Assistance](https://segurastowing.com/services/roadside-assistance): Flat tire change, fuel delivery, battery jump, lockout — fast 24/7 roadside help across Inglewood and the South Bay.
- [Lockout Service](https://segurastowing.com/services/lockout-service): Damage-free car unlock service. Professional tools, no broken windows or scratched paint.
- [Jump Start](https://segurastowing.com/services/jump-start): Dead battery jump start service. Back on the road in minutes — 24/7 availability.
- [Accident Recovery](https://segurastowing.com/services/accident-recovery): Professional accident scene vehicle recovery. We coordinate with insurance and law enforcement.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How quickly can a tow truck reach me in Inglewood?**
Our average response time inside Inglewood is 10 to 15 minutes. Across the wider South Bay coverage area, expect 15 to 30 minutes. We are based on W 108th St in Inglewood and dispatch immediately when you call.

**How much does towing cost in Inglewood, CA?**
Pricing depends on distance, vehicle type, and time of day. We provide a free upfront quote over the phone before dispatching a truck — no hidden fees, ever. Call (310) 490-0246 for a quote.

**Are you open 24/7?**
Yes. Segura's Towing operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year — including weekends and all holidays. A live dispatcher answers every call.

**What vehicles can you tow?**
Cars, trucks, SUVs, motorcycles, classic vehicles, luxury cars, AWD vehicles, low-clearance sports cars, and light heavy-duty trucks. Our flatbeds protect every vehicle from damage.

**Do you serve LAX and the airport area?**
Yes. We routinely dispatch to LAX, Westchester, El Segundo, and the airport perimeter for emergency towing and roadside assistance.

**What payment methods do you accept?**
We accept cash and all major credit cards. Pricing is quoted upfront before dispatch.
